title: FINE ELEMENTS 1800W Steam Iron, Non Stick Soleplate, Thermostatic Control and 80ml Water Tank Capacity, Dry and Stream Functions
features: HYBRID IRON – Our dual function iron offers both steam and dry ironing to best suit your needs, this makes our iron suitable for various fabric types and allows you to adjust the ironing method based on the specific material or preference

ADVANCED THERMOSTATIC CONTROL – With multiple fabric specific settings (liner, cotton, wool, silk, nylon) for effortless and precise ironing of various fabric types, guaranteeing excellent results without the risk of damage or burning

80ML CAPACITY WATER TANK – The large capacity water tank means you can tackle larger piles of laundry without the worry of running out of steam, ensuring uninterrupted steam flow, which is advantageous when dealing with stubborn wrinkles

NON-STICK SOLEPLATE – The non-stick coating on the soleplate helps to distribute heat evenly, ensuring consistent and effective ironing. Effortlessly glide over fabrics and prevent snagging and sticking, resulting in smooth, wrinkle-free clothes

STYLISH, COMPACT DESIGN – Our steam and dry iron comes in a stylish blue and white design that will enhance your ironing needs. The compact design makes it an ideal choice for both travel and home use, adding convenience to your ironing routine
description: WATER CAPACITY With it's 80ml capacity for water, This iron removes creases on clothing both quickly and easily, making ironing hassle-free. THERMOSTATIC CONTROL Easily control the temperature you use for ironing different materials with the thermostat control that is built into this iron. STEAM AND DRY FUNCTIONS This iron has both dry and steam functions - use the steam function to loosen up the fabric with moisture and smooth out easily with heat.
